notes: DIVOC publishes a Swagger 2.0 vaccination-api.yaml on GitHub but it was not directly fetchable at capture time. The single certify endpoint (POST /v1/certify) was confirmed from the compiled adaptor bundle, and the request schema (preEnrollmentCode/recipient/vaccination/vaccinator/facility) from the adaptor's JSDoc example and DIVOC docs. Response shape (Certificate) approximated from DIVOC certificate-generation documentation. Base URL is a mock placeholder since DIVOC is self-hosted.
